data.title: QCP: Breakdown in US-Iran talks triggers risk aversion, Bitcoin stalls at $74,000.
data.description: QCP's latest market report indicates that the breakdown of US-Iran negotiations over the weekend pushed crude oil prices back above $100, leading to a decline in market risk appetite. In the crypto market, Bitcoin encountered resistance around $74,000, while Ethereum fell from $2,330 to $2,180, indicating a slight adjustment in short-term expectations. The report states that Trump's remarks about closing the Strait of Hormuz, coupled with potential provocative signals from Iran, have increased geopolitical uncertainty, but the market remains cautious about actual implementation. Meanwhile, implied volatility in the crypto market has fallen back to pre-conflict levels, showing that the market is gradually digesting related risks. In terms of funding, Bitcoin ETFs continue to see inflows, with IBIT experiencing a net inflow of approximately $612 million last week. Market focus is shifting from policy statements to actual implementation.

data.title: Bitcoin Falls Below $71,000 Amid Rising Geopolitical Tensions
data.description: Bitcoin experienced a decline, reaching an intraday low of $70,570 following the conclusion of U.S.-Iran talks without an agreement. According to NS3.AI, this drop coincided with Brent crude prices surpassing $103 per barrel. The U.S. Central Command announced plans to enforce a blockade on maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports starting at 10 a.m. Eastern time on April 13, while allowing transit through the Strait of Hormuz to non-Iranian ports. Rachael Lucas noted that U.S.-listed Bitcoin ETFs attracted $786 million in the week ending April 10, which could provide support if geopolitical tensions do not escalate further.

data.title: Trader Incurs Significant Loss After Depositing Ethereum to CEX
data.description: A trader recently deposited 2,540 ETH into a centralized exchange (CEX) after holding it for three months. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, this move resulted in a loss of approximately $2.4 million.

data.title: WINkLink Expands Stablecoin Price Services
data.description: Decentralized oracle platform WINkLink has announced the addition of price services for the stablecoin $U. According to ChainCatcher, the initial launch includes the $U/TRX and $U/USD trading pairs. This development aims to provide reliable and dependable data support for $U within the TRON DeFi ecosystem, enhancing its usability and security. The move lays a solid foundation for the implementation of more innovative financial scenarios in the future.

data.title: Dogecoin Developers Test Quantum-Resistant Transaction Technology
data.description: Dogecoin developers are currently testing new transaction technology aimed at resisting attacks from quantum computers. According to NS3.AI, this initiative is part of a broader effort to enhance the security of the Dogecoin network against potential quantum threats. However, for the network to achieve full quantum resistance, a significant chain upgrade would be necessary.

data.title: Symbiosis to Cease Support for Polygon zkEVM Network
data.description: Cross-chain protocol Symbiosis will discontinue support for cross-chain swaps on the Polygon zkEVM network starting May 16. According to Foresight News, users holding liquidity on this network are advised to withdraw their funds before the network is fully shut down. The liquidity withdrawal feature will remain available until the network is completely disabled.

data.title: Zcash Open Development Lab Unveils Strategic Direction Focused on Post-Quantum Security
data.description:
On April 13, Zcash Open Development Lab (ZODL) founder Josh Swihart announced the latest developments for Zcash, emphasizing a strategic direction centered on post-quantum security, scalability, and user experience. According to BlockBeats, Swihart likened the initiative to the Artemis II lunar mission, highlighting the pursuit of seemingly impossible goals through technological breakthroughs. The ZODL team revealed that Zcash is entering the 'Zcash IV' phase, aiming to build infrastructure akin to a 'lunar base' to support the protocol and applications' secure expansion to billions of users, while advancing the vision of privacy transactions without large-scale financial surveillance.

On the product and technology front, ZODL continues to iterate, with its 3.3.x version now available on iOS and Android, featuring new hardware wallet connection management, SDK upgrades, and multiple user experience enhancements. Key developments include advancing Keystone wallet functionality and upgrading the address system (ZIP 316, UIVK/UFVK). Meanwhile, the Zcash core team has addressed several system issues and is progressing with the Zallet alpha version development, strengthening unified address standards and wallet interaction experience to lay the foundation for future scalability and performance improvements.

Additionally, ZODL disclosed ongoing growth in application data and participation in a stablecoin privacy summit to enhance industry collaboration. However, due to increased regulatory and network restrictions, ZODL has temporarily removed its app from Russian app stores. The team emphasized that privacy is not optional but a fundamental need in the digital age, and they will continue to accelerate delivery pace to promote ZEC adoption and ecosystem development.

The core of Zcash Open Development Lab is to develop an open, self-custodial private financial platform, aiming to expand ecosystem interoperability through collaboration and bring protected ZEC transactions to the global mainstream market.

data.title: RAVE's Price Surge Raises Concerns Over Market Manipulation
data.description:
RAVE's recent spot price surged from $0.3 to $6.2, marking a 20-fold increase, sparking suspicions of contract manipulation within the community. According to ChainCatcher, this maneuver led to liquidations exceeding $37 million across the network, with short positions accounting for over $31 million. The project team is estimated to have profited more than $30 million.

Community reports suggest that the RAVE project is managed by the former ARPA and Bella Protocol team, led by Felix Xu and Yemu. In 2021, Felix Xu raised a $20 million crypto fund, ZX Squared Capital, primarily focused on quantitative trading. The fund reportedly provided the capital for RAVE's market-making and price-pumping activities, allowing the project team to self-initiate, self-fund, and self-market, thereby minimizing trust issues and insider trading risks to maximize profits.

data.title: GENIUS Airdrop Opens on Binance Alpha: 240 Tokens for Users With 230+ Alpha Points
data.description: According to Binance Wallet's post on X, Binance Alpha will debut Genius Foundation (GENIUS) on April 13, 2026, at 11:00 UTC, making it the first platform to list the token. Users holding at least 230 Binance Alpha Points may claim a 240-GENIUS airdrop on a first-come, first-served basis; claiming consumes 15 Alpha Points. If the reward pool remains undistributed, the points threshold automatically drops by 5 every 5 minutes. Claims must be confirmed on the Alpha Events page within 24 hours or are forfeited.

data.title: Investor Shifts Focus from Oil to U.S. Stock Market
data.description:
On April 13, Hyperinsight reported that the largest holder of short positions in crude oil on Hyperliquid, identified as address 0xa65, closed their loss-making positions last week and briefly attempted to go long in an effort to capitalize on a market bottom. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the investor subsequently closed these positions and exited the oil market entirely.

The investor has now shifted their focus to the U.S. stock market, specifically the storage sector. They have retained two long positions opened earlier this month in Micron Technology (MU) and SanDisk (SNDK), with a total holding size of $5.4 million. The current floating profit from these positions has reached $1.15 million.

data.title: Investment Alert: Significant Premium Risk in Guotou Silver LOF Fund
data.description: On April 13, Jin10 reported that Guotou Silver LOF Fund announced a significant premium in its secondary market trading price compared to the fund's net asset value. According to Jin10, investors are advised to be cautious of the premium risk in secondary market trading prices. Blind investments in fund shares with high premium rates may lead to substantial losses if the market price declines. The fund will suspend trading from the market opening until 10:30 on April 14, 2026, and will resume trading at 10:30. Redemption services will continue as usual during the suspension period.

data.title: U.S. Dollar's Share in Global Reserves Hits Lowest Since 1994
data.description: The U.S. dollar currently represents approximately 46% of global foreign exchange and gold reserves, according to NS3.AI, citing data from the International Monetary Fund (IMF). When excluding gold, the dollar accounts for 57% of global reserve currencies, marking its lowest share since 1994.

data.title: Japanese Game Company WIZE Expands Solana Holdings
data.description:
Japanese game company WIZE, formerly known as Mobcast Holdings, has announced that its cumulative purchase of SOL has reached approximately $3.13 million (500 million yen) as of April 10, 2026. According to Foresight News, the company currently holds over 24,597 SOL, with an average purchase price of around $127 (20,327 yen) per SOL, ranking 15th globally on CoinGecko's 'Solana Treasury Holdings' list.

Over the past six months, WIZE has earned more than 400 SOL in staking rewards. The company's 'WIZE Validator Node' has officially joined the Solana Foundation's SFDP program and has received delegations from projects like DoubleZero. Including external delegations, WIZE's total treasury amounts to approximately 152,000 SOL. The company aims to further increase its holdings to enter the top 10 globally as soon as possible.

data.title: Circle and Dunamu signed a memorandum of understanding to advance cooperation in areas such as stablecoins.
data.description: USDC issuer Circle has signed a comprehensive Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Dunamu, the parent company of the South Korean trading platform Upbit, to collaborate on stablecoins and digital assets. The two companies are reportedly exploring cooperation plans including stablecoin applications and related educational programs, aiming to improve market participants' access to information and enhance trust within the South Korean digital asset ecosystem. Dunamu stated that this collaboration will also help promote compliant development and innovation in the local market. (News1)

data.title: DWF Labs Founder Predicts Older Coins Unlikely to Reach All-Time Highs
data.description: DWF Labs founder Andrei Grachev has expressed skepticism about the potential for older cryptocurrencies to achieve their previous all-time highs. According to NS3.AI, Grachev noted that while the market dynamics have evolved, many of these older projects have not adapted accordingly. This observation suggests a challenging future for legacy cryptocurrencies in the rapidly changing digital asset landscape.

data.title: Binance Wallet: The minimum requirement to claim the GENIUS airdrop is 230 points, and applying will consume 15 points.
data.description: Binance Wallet announced that Binance Alpha will list Genius Foundation (GENIUS) on April 13th at 19:00. Users holding at least 230 Binance Alpha Points can claim an airdrop of 240 GENIUS tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. If the reward pool is not fully distributed, the claim threshold will decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Participating in the claim will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | U.S. Precious Metals Stocks Decline in Pre-Market Trading
data.description: In pre-market trading, U.S. precious metals stocks experienced a downturn. According to Jin10, Newmont Corporation saw a decline of 2.4%, while Coeur Mining, Inc. also fell by 2.4%. Additionally, Pan American Silver Corp. recorded a decrease of 1.7%.

data.title: Carson Block Warns of Potential U.S. Stock Market Turbulence
data.description: Carson Block, founder of Muddy Waters and a globally recognized short seller, has issued a stark warning about the U.S. stock market. According to Jin10, Block suggests that the market could experience volatility surpassing that of the 2008 financial crisis. He attributes this potential upheaval to the disruptive impact of AI technologies on the market. Block advises short sellers to prepare for opportunities, indicating that betting against the U.S. stock market might be favorable in the current environment.

data.title: Trader "Lovely Woman" shorted RAVE with 2x leverage, and is currently experiencing a paper loss of approximately $1.97 million.
data.description: OKX platform data shows that trader "Lovely Woman" currently holds a short position in RAVEUSDT perpetual contracts with a leverage of approximately 2.01x. Her position comprises approximately 392,000 RAVE tokens, with an average opening price of approximately $3.98. The current mark price is approximately $9.03, resulting in a floating loss of approximately $1.97 million and a return of approximately -253%.
